description_long: This is a modern, rectangular house with a flat roof and large, grid-style windows on its exterior walls. The structure features a white or light gray brick facade, and the interior layout is visible, showing multiple rooms and open spaces. The house is surrounded by several trees, including purple-flowering and green-leaved varieties, which add a landscaped touch to the property. The windows are arranged in symmetrical rows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The main entryway is marked by a prominent door beneath a large window, with no visible porch or overhang. The overall design is minimalist and contemporary, emphasizing clean lines and open spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large grid windows, white brick walls, and a landscaped perimeter of colorful trees. The design is minimalist, with symmetrical window rows and a prominent main entry.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from above and slightly to the front, revealing the interior room layout and a nearby purple-flowering tree.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front facade with symmetrical large windows and a row of purple trees lining the front.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear and side of the house, highlighting the open interior and a mix of green and purple trees.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the back of the house with more visible rooms, a flat roof, and landscaping including a tall green tree and a bush.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a large, grid-style window above the door, no porch or overhang, minimalist design
